brand_name.label: Brand name override
brand_name.info: Optional. Used for document metadata when a custom brand name is needed.

brand_primary_color.label: Brand primary color
brand_primary_color.info: Sets the shared brand token used by the minimal shell and focus state.

favicon.label: Favicon
favicon.info: Optional. Used as the browser and device icon for the shell.

canvas_color.label: Canvas color
canvas_color.info: Sets the default page background token for the minimal runtime shell.

text_color.label: Text color
text_color.info: Sets the default text token used by the base document styling.

spacing_scale.label: Spacing scale
spacing_scale.info: Controls the shared shell rhythm and page gutter spacing.

radius_scale.label: Radius scale
radius_scale.info: Controls the shared shell corner rounding tokens.

motion_level.label: Motion level
motion_level.info: Sets the default transition intensity for the minimal runtime foundation.

direction_mode.label: Document direction
direction_mode.info: Auto follows the active locale. Use an override only when the shell must stay fixed.

shell_width.label: Shell width
shell_width.info: Controls the neutral page container width used by the global shell only.

heading.label: Heading
heading.info: Optional. Displays a neutral heading above the content body.

body.label: Rich text
body.info: Defines the content body for the utility validation section.

cta_label.label: CTA link label
cta_label.info: Optional. Leave blank to hide the action link.

cta_link.label: CTA link
cta_link.info: Shown only when the link label is not blank.

width_mode.label: Width mode
width_mode.info: Controls the neutral container width for the section shell.

spacing_mode.label: Spacing mode
spacing_mode.info: Controls the neutral vertical spacing of the section shell.

stone_utility_block_stack.name: Utility block stack
stone_utility_block_stack.empty: Add at least one utility block to validate the neutral stack flow.

heading.label: Section heading
heading.info: Optional. Displays a neutral heading above the block stack.

width_mode.label: Width mode
width_mode.info: Controls the neutral container width for the section shell.

spacing_mode.label: Spacing mode
spacing_mode.info: Controls the neutral vertical spacing of the section shell.

text.label: Heading text
text.info: Adds one short heading to the stack item.

body.label: Rich text
body.info: Defines one neutral content body for the stack item.

items.label: List items
items.info: Enter one item per line to keep the utility list neutral.

stone_utility_layout_composition.name: Utility layout composition
stone_utility_layout_composition.empty: Add at least one utility block to validate the two-region composition.
stone_utility_layout_composition.empty_region: Assign a utility block to this region to validate the grouped layout.

heading.label: Section heading
heading.info: Optional. Displays a neutral heading above the two-region composition.

width_mode.label: Width mode
width_mode.info: Controls the neutral container width for the section shell.

spacing_mode.label: Spacing mode
spacing_mode.info: Controls the neutral vertical spacing of the section shell.

text.label: Heading text
text.info: Adds one short heading to the selected utility region.

region.label: Region
region.info: Assigns this heading block to the primary or secondary utility region.

body.label: Rich text
body.info: Defines one neutral content body for the selected utility region.

region.label: Region
region.info: Assigns this rich text block to the primary or secondary utility region.

items.label: List items
items.info: Enter one item per line to keep the utility list neutral inside the selected region.

region.label: Region
region.info: Assigns this list block to the primary or secondary utility region.

stone_utility_action_group.name: Utility action group
stone_utility_action_group.empty: Add at least one action block with a label and link to validate the grouped action pattern.

heading.label: Section heading
heading.info: Optional. Displays a neutral heading above the grouped actions.

body.label: Intro text
body.info: Optional. Displays neutral supporting copy above the grouped actions.

width_mode.label: Width mode
width_mode.info: Controls the neutral container width for the section shell.

spacing_mode.label: Spacing mode
spacing_mode.info: Controls the neutral vertical spacing of the section shell.

action_alignment.label: Action alignment
action_alignment.info: Controls the inline alignment of the grouped utility actions.

label.label: Action label
label.info: Required with a link to render one grouped utility action.

link.label: Action link
link.info: Required with a label to render one grouped utility action.

style.label: Action style
style.info: Keeps emphasis bounded to neutral primary, secondary, or text-link treatments.

stone_utility_key_value_list.name: Utility key-value list
stone_utility_key_value_list.empty: Add at least one item block with a term and value to validate the structured key-value pattern.

heading.label: Section heading
heading.info: Optional. Displays a neutral heading above the structured key-value list.

width_mode.label: Width mode
width_mode.info: Controls the neutral container width for the section shell.

spacing_mode.label: Spacing mode
spacing_mode.info: Controls the neutral vertical spacing of the section shell.

term.label: Term
term.info: Adds one short neutral label for the structured pair.

value.label: Value
value.info: Adds one neutral rich-text value for the structured pair.
